name: Chewy Oatmeal Trail Mix Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Semi-sweet chocolate chips or milk chocolate chips
3/4 cup Coarsely chopped walnuts (or pecans or peanuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease baking sheets with shortening. Place sheets of foil on a countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine shortening, brown sugar, egg, milk, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. In another bowl, combine oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon. Mix into the creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips, raisins, nuts, and sunflower seeds.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto prepared baking sheets.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time in the oven at 375°F (190°C) for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned. Do not overbake. Cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing cookies to foil to cool completely.
Makes: About 3 dozen cookies
Note: You may substitute 3 cups (750 mL) of prepared trail mix (available in grocery or health food stores) for the chips, raisins, nuts, and sunflower seeds.
